{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=This Snail Shell came from a boxer who trained every day against a steel board until they bled and their skin came off. Not sure why, but the boxer spends half an hour passing gas after each training session.
|affct=FAME
|hard=HP
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=9034
|relic1=Costa Rica Stone
|relic2=Supersoldier Serum
|relic3=Golden Finger
|relic4=Ali's Belt
|relic5=World Bowl
}}
|color=green
|earth=1
|water=0
|fire=5
|wind=0
|form=Zombie
|element=Wind
|realm=Cathay
|orangehard=HP
}}
